summary: Verified programs 1-7. Results: Kajabi VERIFIED, Coursera VERIFIED, LinkedIn Learning VERIFIED, Thinkific VERIFIED, Society6 REJECTED (not accepting new artists), Zazzle VERIFIED, Dribbble Marketplace VERIFIED. 6 VERIFIED, 1 REJECTED.

Verified programs 8-14. All 7 VERIFIED: Discord Server Subscriptions (90% rev share), Steam Steamworks (70% rev share), Itch.io (open rev share, dev keeps ~90%), TuneCore (100% royalties, annual fee model), CD Baby (91% royalties, one-time fee), Audiomack AMP (50% rev share, 50k plays required), 500px Licensing (25-100% of net sales via Getty/VCG). All qualify as creator programs — earn by making content/games/music/photos, not by referrals.

Verified programs 15-20 + 3 bonus. Results: REJECTED: Luma AI (no direct pay, perks only), Suno AI (no ongoing program, one-time 2024 comp only), HeyGen (affiliate only, no creator pay). VERIFIED: WordPress ThemeForest (devs earn from themes built), AppSumo (makers earn from products listed), Podia (creators earn from courses/content sold). BONUS: VERIFIED Threadless (artist designs earn royalties), VERIFIED Redbubble (confirmed creator not affiliate), REJECTED Adobe Express (no template creator program exists).
